'''âm-f-t-m''' ('''kamaftemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cuss|cuss]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cuss|cuss]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-f-t-m
|-
! Lemma
| kamaftemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimaftemoko|thimaftemoko]] || [[word:jimaftemoko|jimaftemoko]] || [[word:shimaftemoko|shimaftemoko]] || [[word:kimaftemoko|kimaftemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumaftemoko|thuthumaftemoko]] || [[word:jujumaftemoko|jujumaftemoko]] || [[word:shushumaftemoko|shushumaftemoko]] || [[word:kukumaftemoko|kukumaftemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumaftemoko|thumaftemoko]] || [[word:jumaftemoko|jumaftemoko]] || [[word:shumaftemoko|shumaftemoko]] || [[word:kumaftemoko|kumaftemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumaftemoko|thumaftemoko]] || [[word:jumaftemoko|jumaftemoko]] || [[word:shumaftemoko|shumaftemoko]] || [[word:kumaftemoko|kumaftemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themaftemoko|themaftemoko]] || [[word:jemaftemoko|jemaftemoko]] || [[word:shemaftemoko|shemaftemoko]] || [[word:kemaftemoko|kemaftemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomaftemoko|thothomaftemoko]] || [[word:jojomaftemoko|jojomaftemoko]] || [[word:shoshomaftemoko|shoshomaftemoko]] || [[word:kokomaftemoko|kokomaftemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomaftemoko|thomaftemoko]] || [[word:jomaftemoko|jomaftemoko]] || [[word:shomaftemoko|shomaftemoko]] || [[word:komaftemoko|komaftemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomaftemoko|thomaftemoko]] || [[word:jomaftemoko|jomaftemoko]] || [[word:shomaftemoko|shomaftemoko]] || [[word:komaftemoko|komaftemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmaftemoko|thĂŠmaftemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠmaftemoko|jĂŠmaftemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠmaftemoko|shĂŠmaftemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠmaftemoko|kĂŠmaftemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamaftemoko|thathamaftemoko]] || [[word:jajamaftemoko|jajamaftemoko]] || [[word:shashamaftemoko|shashamaftemoko]] || [[word:kakamaftemoko|kakamaftemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamaftemoko|thamaftemoko]] || [[word:jamaftemoko|jamaftemoko]] || [[word:shamaftemoko|shamaftemoko]] || [[word:kamaftemoko|kamaftemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamaftemoko|thamaftemoko]] || [[word:jamaftemoko|jamaftemoko]] || [[word:shamaftemoko|shamaftemoko]] || [[word:kamaftemoko|kamaftemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
